title: SSO redirect loop for internal app

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Internal app stuck in login loop
servicenow_seed.description: User can access email and Windows, but the HR portal redirects back to login repeatedly.

correct_steps: Confirm issue in private browser or another device
Check whether other users are affected
Escalate to IAM with app name and SSO evidence
rationale: SSO loops usually require IAM/app SAML configuration review, not local password reset.
